nasb.text: Then he said to me, ‘Please stand beside me and kill me, for agony has seized me because my life still lingers in me.’

esv.text: And he said to me, ‘Stand beside me and kill me, for anguish has seized me, and yet my life still lingers.’

cnv.text: 於是他對我說：‘請你站到我身邊來，把我殺死，因為痛苦抓住我，我卻還死不了。’

ccb.text: 扫罗说他痛苦难当，却又死不掉，要我杀了他。
